title: MapReduce shuffle and sort
description: The shuffle and sort phase of a MapReduce job is responsible for reordering the map outputs generated by the mappers and grouping them by their target reducers. This phase ensures that the reducers receive the map outputs in a format that allows them to efficiently process the data. The shuffle and sort phase uses the MergeManagerImpl class to manage the merging of map outputs, which can be either in-memory or on-disk. The class contains logic for merging in-memory map outputs, as well as logic for merging on-disk map outputs. The merged map outputs are then written to disk, and the shuffle and sort phase is complete.
raw_response:
TITLE: MapReduce shuffle and sort

DESCRIPTION:
The shuffle and sort phase of a MapReduce job is responsible for reordering the map outputs generated by the mappers and grouping them by their target reducers. This phase ensures that the reducers receive the map outputs in a format that allows them to efficiently process the data. The shuffle and sort phase uses the MergeManagerImpl class to manage the merging of map outputs, which can be either in-memory or on-disk. The class contains logic for merging in-memory map outputs, as well as logic for merging on-disk map outputs. The merged map outputs are then written to disk, and the shuffle and sort phase is complete.
